name: Basic Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 cups water or stock of choice
4 bouillon cubes (if soup-stock is not used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the onion into thin slices.
2. Pour the oil into a soup pot and cook over medium heat until the onions turn brown. Stir continually.
3. Add the water (or stock) and bouillon cubes to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste. Stir well.
5. Pour the soup into oven-proof bowls.
6. Top each bowl with a slice of toasted bread, sprinkle with grated Gruyere cheese, and carefully place the bowls in a preheated oven (350°F) for 5 to 10 minutes until the cheese begins to bubble.
